DISCOVERY 525, AUG-16-2024 HEARING ON EZEQUIEL MONTANO'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS. NOT ARGUED/CONTESTED. THE COURT ACKNOWLEDGES THAT THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY THE PETITIONER. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER QUASHING THE TWO SUBPOENAS AT ISSUE IS DENIED. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. COUNSEL FOR THE CITY ATTORNEY IS DIRECTED TO PREPARE A FORM OF PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE TENTATIVE RULING AND SUBMIT IT TO PSW@HASSARD.COM FOR REVIEW AND EXECUTION. JUDGE PRO TEM: PHILIP WARD. CLERK: R. WOODS. COURT REPORTER: BRIANNA RUDD; CSR: 13668; T: 209.747.1306; E: BRIANNARUDD@GMAIL.COM. (525/JPT)
